title: dombeya spectabilis var. lantziana
intro: Dombeya spectabilis var. lantziana, also known as the wild pear or Cape hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the hibiscus family, characterized by its showy white or pink flowers and small, red fruit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Dombeya spectabilis var. lantziana include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
